initiatives.name: SURJ Olympia
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Olympia. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Emma Goldman Youth & Homeless Outreach Project (EGYHOP)
initiatives.description: We have been providing direct, street-based outreach five nights a week in downtown Olympia, Washington since 1999.

initiatives.name: oly prisoner letter writing
initiatives.description: destroy all prisons, write to & nurture relationships with prisoners.

initiatives.name: People's Open-Mic Olympia
initiatives.description: Free coffee, tea, produce and open mic. A weekly hangout run by community members at The Mortuary
